name: ad_rca_entity_profile
description: Build a complete anomaly dossier for a suspect entity across ALL jobs. Given an entity value (e.g. host.name: server-01), shows every anomaly where it appeared as an influencer, by_field, partition_field, or over_field value. Use after identifying a suspect via ad_query_influencers to build full context.

configuration.query: FROM .ml-anomalies-* | WHERE result_type == "record" AND timestamp >= ?start_time AND timestamp <= ?end_time AND (by_field_value == ?entity_value OR over_field_value == ?entity_value OR partition_field_value == ?entity_value) | SORT timestamp ASC | LIMIT 100 | KEEP job_id, timestamp, record_score, function, field_name, by_field_name, by_field_value, over_field_name, over_field_value, partition_field_name, partition_field_value, actual, typical, multi_bucket_impact

start_time.description: Start of time range in ISO 8601 format

end_time.description: End of time range in ISO 8601 format
